headline: Warren Buffett's Hand-Picked Successor, Greg Abel, Revamped Berkshire Hathaway's Portfolio. Should You Buy the Only Berkshire Dividend Stock Left That Yields Over 6%?
summary: This company's robust dividend isn't the only reason Berkshire Hathaway is holding on to shares.

headline: JP Morgan Maintains Underweight on Kraft Heinz, Raises Price Target to $22
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Thomas Palmer   maintains Kraft Heinz (NASDAQ:KHC) with a Underweight and raises the price target from $21 to $22.
